text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And this is where we'll place most of the
decorations.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I'll have to bow out now! I've got to
attend a meeting with Trainer Kashimoto!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, thanks for the help! Don't forget, I'll need
you tomorrow. We don't have enough people to
carry everything.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
I've got you covered! Carrying things makes for
good training, so I'm cool with it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... We're good on the decorations, but I don't
think one fridge can store all this food.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Shall I arrange for some cold-storage vans? If we
only need a few, I can call them in right away.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you serious?! You're a lifesaver! I'll
apply for parking space, so just let me know the
vehicle models and whatnot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Understood. I'll make the call right away.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We could do with some decorations here,
actually... And we'll need to move the tables
around for the buffet...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Hishiama? I h-heard you plan to make the
food all by yourself, so I, um...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that was the plan. It's a lot for one set of
hands though... I'd appreciate it if you could help
me out.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I bet ya everyone's gonna try and flood the dance
floor... I should write a warning.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Me me me me! I'll write it! You can trust me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'll leave it in your hands then. Write,
"Don't hog the dance floor!" Okay?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Don't hug the dance floor. Got it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Budget sheet and housekeeping
announcements are good to go. Things are
shapin' up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Looks like we're all in for another fun holiday!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Couldn't have done it without everyone being so
eager to help out in between training sessions.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Watch out, Fuji! This year, Miho is gonna be the dorm of holiday cheer!
